site.title: NevoFlux
site.description: NevoFlux - The AI-Native Browser. Don't Just Browse. Command.

auth.title: Sign in to NevoFlux
auth.subtitle: Publish and manage your packs.
auth.magicLinkSent: Check your inbox for a sign-in link.

hero.title: Don't Just Browse. Command.
hero.subtitle: An AI-native browser with identity, memory, and autonomous computer control. Your agentic companion that orchestrates AI agents and evolves with you.

features.title: Built for the Age of AI
features.subtitle: NevoFlux embeds AI intelligence directly into the browser engine — not as an extension, but as a core capability.

identity.title: Identity & Soul
identity.description: A personalized AI companion with evolving behavioral patterns. Customize its personality, values, and communication style.

memory.title: Memory & Learning
memory.description: Cross-session encrypted storage with preference adaptation. Your browser learns from every interaction.

autonomy.title: Progressive Autonomy
autonomy.description: Three capability tiers — Chat, Browser, and Agent — giving you control over how much autonomy your AI has.

systemControl.title: Full System Control
systemControl.description: 70+ browser automation APIs plus cross-platform screen capture, mouse and keyboard control. From web pages to your entire OS — AI commands it all.

canvas.title: Canvas Micro Apps
canvas.description: Generate functional mini-applications on the fly. React, Vue, or Svelte — powered by coding agents, built and running in seconds.

agentEcosystem.title: Agent Ecosystem
agentEcosystem.description: 16+ LLM providers for the brain. Coding agents and personal agents for the hands. One browser to orchestrate them all.

modes.title: Three Modes. One Browser.
modes.subtitle: Progressive autonomy — you control the level of AI power.

chat.title: Chat
chat.description: Pure conversational AI. Ask questions, get answers, brainstorm ideas — no tools needed.

browser.title: Browser
browser.description: AI controls the browser. Navigate pages, click elements, fill forms, capture screenshots.

agent.title: Agent
agent.description: Full autonomy. File operations, bash commands, computer control, coding agents, personal agents, and canvas generation.

agentArch.title: The NevoFlux Stack
agentArch.subtitle: Three layers. One browser. Infinite possibility.

llm.label: LLM Providers
llm.description: 16+ AI providers — Claude, GPT, Qwen, DeepSeek, Gemini, and local models via Ollama. Choose the intelligence that fits your task.

coding.label: Coding Agents
coding.description: Orchestrate Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and more — directly from your browser. Build full-stack apps, debug code, ship features.

operator.label: Loops & GBrain
operator.description: Set a Loop and it runs on its own — on a schedule or a trigger, watching pages, capturing changes, and saving them to your GBrain while you sleep. When a task needs hands, Agent Mode clicks and fills for you. Extend any of it with Packs — or reach it hands-free from WhatsApp and Telegram via OpenClaw, native inside NevoFlux with no external browser to drive.

comparison.title: Beyond AI Browsers
comparison.subtitle: NevoFlux isn't just another AI sidebar. It's a fundamentally different architecture.

hero.title: Instant superpowers for your browser
hero.subtitle: Install a Pack and your browser learns a whole workflow — skills, canvas tools, and a ready-made dashboard, all in one place.

items.name: Design Pack
items.tagline: Pick a design system on a dashboard and let your browser generate the UI.

items.name: Career Pack
items.tagline: Tailor your resume, track applications, and prep interviews — your browser runs the job hunt.

items.name: Research Pack
items.tagline: Collect sources, extract findings, and build a literature map without leaving the page.

items.name: OKF Pack
items.tagline: Package what your browser learns into OKF, the open standard for AI-agent knowledge exchange — so any agent can read and reuse it.

steps.title: Add to NevoFlux
steps.desc: One install brings its skills, tools, and dashboard.

steps.title: Use it
steps.desc: Your new workflow is ready in Canvas.

packs.build: Want to build your own Pack? Read the docs →

cta.title: Ready to Command Your Browser?
cta.subtitle: Open source, privacy-first, and built on Firefox.
